name: Walt Disney Co
summary: The Walt Disney Company is a diversified worldwide entertainment company operating in three segments: Entertainment, Sports, and Experiences. Entertainment includes linear TV networks (ABC, Disney, FX, National Geographic), direct-to-consumer streaming services (Disney+, Hulu), and content sales/licensing. Sports includes ESPN properties. The company produces and distributes film and episodic content globally, operates theme parks and resorts under Experiences, and licenses intellectual property across consumer products and live entertainment.
